const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73280995 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73280995 -maxdepth 7 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"if [ -n \"${DECIDED_BEFORE:-}\" ]; then echo \"DECIDED_BEFORE is set\"; else echo \"DECIDED_BEFORE is not set\"; fi; rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert|Relist|relist|CVSG|Seventh|salience band|Salience|2025 Term|Term 2025|Paid\" metrics/statpack.md | head -220","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --citation 'Carlson v. Green' --era 2020s --limit 10","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000});

{"cell_id": "16", "max_tokens": 30000, "yield_time_ms": 30000}

const ms = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|search|citation|docket|opinion/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description));
text(ms);

const t = ALL_TOOLS.find(x => x.name === "mcp__courtlistener__search");
if (!t) { text("search tool unavailable"); exit(); }
const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({
  type: "o",
  q: "\"Carlson v. Green\" Bivens medical",
  filed_after: "2024-01-01",
  filed_before: "2026-07-16",
  court: ["ca1","ca3","ca4","ca5","ca7","ca9","ca10","ca11"],
  order_by: "score desc",
  num_results: 10,
  fields: ["id","absolute_url","caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","docketNumbe

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find data/cases -path '*/predictions/codex-baseline/*/prediction.json' -type f | head -3 | while read -r f; do echo \"$f\"; sed -n '1,220p' \"$f\"; done","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"test ! -e data/cases/scotus/73280995/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260716T205846Z && mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73280995/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260716T205846Z && date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq empty data/cases/scotus/73280995/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260716T205846Z/prediction.json data/cases/scotus/73280995/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260716T205846Z/tooling.json && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);
